ead.archdesc:
======= RMA01803School of Hotel Administration Directors records28-1-1803Compiled by E. EngstDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
June 20042B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:30:52 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
School of Hotel Administration Directors records
Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration. Director
28-1-1803
1.1 cubic feet. 1.1 cubic feet.
1922-1981. Correspondence, files, albums, records, reports, meeting minutes, plaques. Records of the Director's Office and of Howard B. Meek include registration reports as well as school budgets, minutes of faculty and staff meetings, and reports. Collection material in English 2084318
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
E. Engst
Date completed:
August 1987
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, June 2004
Date modified:
Jude Corina, September 2015
ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
Directors and deans represented include Howard B. Meek, Robert A. Beck, and John J. Clark.
SERIES LIST
Series I. History Boxes 1-2, 12
Subseries I. Chronological files Subseries II. Biographical files Subseries III. Subject file Subseries IV. Courtney Memorial Fund Subseries V. Registration Reports
Series II. Howard B. Meek files Boxes 1, 4-11
Subseries I. Administrative Records -Registration reports -Correspondence -Miscellaneous Subseries II. European tour Subseries III. Commemorative Items -Plaques and awards -Loose material
Cite As:
School of Hotel Administration Director's records, #28-1-1803. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Scope and content
Records of the Director's Office include correspondence files, including letters from Joseph Vehling, Martha Van Rensselaer and Flora Rose; biographical files; and subject files, including files of the Courtney Memorial Fund. Records of Howard B. Meek include registration reports, with letters to Meek; correspondence; items relating to a Hotel School European tour; and plaques and awards given to Meek. Also, school budgets, 1954-1978; minutes of faculty and staff meetings, 1935-1981; report of the Education Committee of the American Hotel Association, 1944; and minutes of Deans' Council meetings, 1968-1970.
Europe -- Description and travel -- 1945-1970. Hotel management schools -- New York (State) -- Ithaca. Hotel management -- Study and teaching. Meek, Howard B., 1893- Beck, Robert Alfred, 1920- Clark, John J. Vehling, Joseph Dommers, 1879-1950. Van Rensselaer, Martha, 1864-1932. Rose, Flora, 1874-
